---
title: "The Rt. Rev. George Henry Sumner"
---

## The Rt. Rev. George Henry Sumner

**Dates:** (1824-1909)

### Description

Bishop of Guildford

### Biography

He was son of the Rt. Rev. Charles Richard Sumner, Bishop of Winchester, and married (1848) Mary Elizabeth Heywood, founder of the Mothers’ Union.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 3d [1900]
- Letter from May 12 [1900]
- [To Helena Mary Heathcote, July 25, 1899](../letters/3413_To_Helena_Mary_Heathcote.html)
- [To Charlotte Fortescue Yonge, July 20, 1899](../letters/3411_To_Charlotte_Fortescue_Yonge.html)
- [To Mary Yonge, July 1st[1899]](../letters/3409_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- [To Mary Yonge, June 15th 1899](../letters/3408_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- Letter from Decr 21st 1897
- Letter from Feb 23rd 1893
- Letter from Jan 1st 1892
- Letter from Aug 4th 1890
- Letter from April 2 [1886]
- Letter from Oct 21st [after 1875[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
